recommendations.title: The Misadventures of Hedi and Cokeman
recommendations.overview: In Paris, two dysfunctional dealers use family ties to try to boost their small drug business in this crass comedy based on the webseries.

recommendations.title: Outlaw
recommendations.overview: At the age of nine, Rebeca is sold by her grandmother to the bookseller who ran Rocinha. Disputed by bicheiros and drug dealers, the community is going through changes in power. Rebeca becomes the wife of the chief drug dealer and, with the death of

recommendations.title: Kill Shot
recommendations.overview: Posing as hunters, a group of terrorists are in search of $100 million that was stolen and lost in a plane crash en route from Afghanistan.

recommendations.title: Top Cat Begins
recommendations.overview: Top Cat and his new feline friend hatch a scheme to steal from the fearful Mr. Big.

recommendations.title: Bad Cat
recommendations.overview: A foul-mouthed cat and its gang cross paths with humans.

recommendations.title: The Protector
recommendations.overview: A young fighter named Kham must go to Australia to retrieve his stolen elephant. With the help of a Thai-born Australian detective, Kham must take on all comers, including a gang led by an evil woman and her two deadly bodyguards.

recommendations.title: Straight from the Barrio
recommendations.overview: A young drug dealer falls in love while facing disruption among the men in his gang, and being offered a career as a Reggaetón singer.

recommendations.title: Kicks
recommendations.overview: When his hard-earned kicks get snatched by a local hood, fifteen-year old Brandon and his two best friends go on an ill-advised mission across the Bay Area to retrieve the stolen sneakers.

recommendations.title: The Crew
recommendations.overview: One of the members of a gang of thieves commits a serious mistake that force them to work for a ruthless gang of drug dealers, endangering the future of the team, their lives and those of their families.

recommendations.title: Mobsters
recommendations.overview: The story of a group of friends in turn of the century New York, from their early days as street hoods to their rise in the world of organized crime...
